info.header: Permanent Member of the UN Security Council

paragraphs.title: 1. International Relations
paragraphs.text: Germany is a founding member of the European Union and a permanent observer at the United Nations. As one of the world's largest economies, Germany plays a central role in international diplomacy and conflict resolution.

paragraphs.title: 2. Position on the Conflict
paragraphs.text: Germany strongly supports a two-state solution to the conflict. It advocates for peaceful negotiations and calls on all parties to respect international law and human rights obligations.

paragraphs.title: Security and Stability
paragraphs.text: Germany believes that lasting peace can only be achieved through dialogue and mutual recognition. It supports UN peacekeeping missions and humanitarian aid efforts in the region.

info.header: Permanent Member of the UN Security Council

paragraphs.title: 1. International Relations
paragraphs.text: France is a permanent member of the UN Security Council and a leading voice in European and global affairs. France maintains close diplomatic ties across the Middle East and North Africa.

paragraphs.title: 2. Position on the Conflict
paragraphs.text: France supports an immediate ceasefire and the resumption of direct negotiations. It has historically backed a two-state solution and the creation of a Palestinian state based on the 1967 borders.
